name: Halo
description: A modern, minimal, and scalable dark design system that pairs an architectural near-black canvas with precise typography and a tight palette of vibrant signal colors for product-grade interfaces.
concept: Halo treats the interface as a quiet, deep-space substrate where information becomes the source of light. Surfaces stack in three faint tiers of charcoal, hairline borders draw the geometry, and a single electric indigo carries every action while green, yellow, cyan, and magenta act as discrete signal flares for status, data, and emphasis.

palette.name: Elevated
palette.role: Modals, popovers, and highest tier surfaces

palette.name: Indigo
palette.role: Primary action, focus, and brand accent

fonts.name: Inter
fonts.usage: Display headlines, UI labels, and body text

fonts.name: JetBrains Mono
fonts.usage: Metrics, hex tokens, code, and tabular data

iconPack.name: Lucide
iconPack.usage: Used for navigation, action, control, and feature glyphs across the system at a uniform 1.5px stroke weight.
